case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

tool_calls.name: get_evidence
tool_calls.reasoning: Perform full time scan to identify initial anomalies

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s metrics. Adservice latency.p50 dev=+2.4, currencyservice mem dev=+2.3, shippingservice latency.p50 dev=+1.6 show initial anomalies. Ranking prioritizes currencyservice_mem as top candidate.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-60s currencyservice metrics. Mem dev=+2.3 to +2.8 persists; latency.p50 dev=+1.3 shows initial impact. Traces show high Convert call counts with latency.p99 dev=+1.4. Ranking confirms currencyservice_mem as root cause with latency as propagation.
Currencyservice memory exhaustion (dev=+2.3) drove latency spikes, confirmed by traces. Checkoutservice latency followed as propagation. Ranking prioritizes currencyservice_mem first.
